message:
chore: bump version to 0.3.0 for release

Wide-ranging changes since 0.2.0:
- feat: bookmark support across parsing, indexing, search, and storage
- feat(cleanup): remove legacy search stack after frankensearch cutover
- feat(hybrid,test): add migration parity test lane and improve RRF precision
- fix: complete ort rc.9 -> rc.11/12, fastembed 4 -> 5, frankensearch 0.3 migration
- chore(deps): replace git-sourced asupersync with crates.io v0.3.1
- chore(deps): migrate rich_rust, asupersync, tru to crates.io versions

Plus fix benches/search_perf for the new Bookmark variant, and scope clippy
allow-attrs for validated ONNX-dim casts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
